name: Use of Password Hash With Insufficient Computational Effort
description: The product generates a hash for a password but uses a scheme that does not provide sufficient computational effort to resist brute-force attacks. Fast hashing algorithms allow attackers with access to password hashes to crack them through offline computing, especially with GPU or cloud resources.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[password] flows to a TRANSFORM[hash] node using a fast algorithm (MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 without key stretching) before reaching STORAGE[credential_store], without a TRANSFORM[key_stretching] node (bcrypt, scrypt, PBKDF2, argon2) providing computational hardness
